CustomField.description: Operator with whom the contract is either executed or confirmed LOIs awaiting documentation. This field is automatically set when, the 'Awarded' checkbox is checked on the Commercial Terms section of the Prospect page. The cooresponding prospect will be set in this field as the Next operator on AiC page.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Operator with whom the contract is either executed or confirmed LOIs awaiting documentation. This field is automatically set when, the 'Awarded' checkbox is checked on the Commercial Terms section of the Prospect page.
CustomField.label: Next Operator
